training_status: active gym-goer, performs deadlifts, rack pulls, leg extensions, hamstring curls

compounds.frequency: once per week split into two shots

benefits.description: Healed quickly from partial hamstring tear, back to full activity a few weeks after starting the protocol
Was at approximately 75% function within ~3 weeks of injury before starting peptides; reported full recovery after ~2 months on peptides

protocol_notes: OP ordered 100g each of BPC-157 and TB500. Reconstituted vials stored in fridge. Ran protocol for almost two months (approx. 56 days). Injury was a partial hamstring tear diagnosed by a doctor following prone hamstring curl exercise. Bruising and swelling resolved before or during protocol. Stopped use in November. Overall outcome reported as great.
